annual.title: Annual Crime Trend
annual.description: Yearly total crime count trend. Optionally filter by crime type.
annual.insight: Peak year is 2002 with 486802 cases. From 2001 to 2023, change is -84.95%.

weekly.title: Crime Distribution by Weekday
weekly.description: Compare total crime counts from Monday to Sunday.
weekly.insight: Fri is the highest-crime day with 1169913 cases.

hourly.title: Crime Distribution by Hour
hourly.description: Crime distribution across the 24 hours of a day.
hourly.insight: Hour 12 is the highest-crime hour with 446899 cases.

typeShare.title: Crime Type Share
typeShare.description: Top crime types and their percentage share.
typeShare.insight: Top crime type is THEFT with 1642148 cases (21.09% of all selected cases).

district.title: District Crime Comparison
district.description: Compare crime counts across police districts.
district.insight: District 8 has the highest count: 523193 cases.

heatmap.title: Weekday-Hour Heatmap
heatmap.description: Joint distribution of weekday and hour.
heatmap.insight: Peak slot is weekday 7, hour 0 with 70700 cases.

yoy.title: Year-over-Year Trend of Top Crime Types
yoy.description: Compare annual trends for the most common crime categories.
yoy.insight: Track yearly trend among the most frequent crime types.

typeOptions.title: Crime Type Share
typeOptions.description: Top crime types and their percentage share.
typeOptions.insight: Top crime type is THEFT with 1642148 cases (21.09% of all selected cases).

conclusions.title: Dataset scale
conclusions.conclusion: Within selected range, total records are 7784664 from 2001 to 2023.

conclusions.title: Peak annual crime
conclusions.conclusion: Peak annual volume is in 2002 with 486802 cases.

conclusions.title: Lowest annual crime
conclusions.conclusion: Lowest annual volume is in 2023 with 73140 cases.

conclusions.title: Peak weekday
conclusions.conclusion: Weekday Fri is the highest-crime day with 1169913 cases.

conclusions.title: Peak hour
conclusions.conclusion: Hour 12 is the peak crime hour with 446899 cases.

conclusions.title: Top crime type
conclusions.conclusion: Top crime type is THEFT with 1642148 cases (21.09%).
